description:
This is where you describe your game. Pretend you are marketing the game and that people have no clue what it is.
Or make it silly. Whatever you wish I have no control over you.

votv-v0.0.1.description:
The first release of the Voices of the Void Archipelago! Currently supports 0.9j (later 0.9 subversions might work, but haven't been tested).

Please read the [docs](https://github.com/Nathan-R-Og/Archipelago/tree/votv/worlds/votv/docs) on how to install the mod and prepare a run.

You can use the Options Creator built into the Archipelago Launcher to create your YAML.
votv-v0.0.1.title: VotV v0.0.1: First unstable release

votv-v0.0.2.description:
### Fixed
- Argemia plushes and other items can now be gotten in-game correctly.
- Nuclear argemia plushes work correctly as locations.
- Days collected are no longer reset when joining back into a game.
- Detector quality and strength are now correctly disabled depending on the options.
- Bonus Points work correctly.
- The Survive Day objective is registered properly.
- Trash bag locations are filtered correctly.
- Chicken sandwiches not being disabled by the relevant option.

### Added
- Tinfoil hat and cigarettes as locations and items.
- Progressive Breaker Time as an item.
- Reminder to connect to Archipelago when starting a game.
- Version check when connecting.
- Instructions for Linux users that might have issues.

This version is backwards-compatible with worlds generated with v0.0.1.

Please read the [docs](https://github.com/Nathan-R-Og/Archipelago/tree/votv/worlds/votv/docs) on how to install the mod and prepare a run.
You can use the Options Creator built into the Archipelago Launcher to create your YAML.
votv-v0.0.2.title: VotV v0.0.2: Various fixes
